pom.xml.general_idea: Upgraded Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.4 to 3.2.0 to align with Java 21 support and modern framework features.
Updated Java version properties and compiler plugin configuration to target Java 21.
Replaced the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new JDBC-compliant artifact required for Spring Boot 3.
Added the internal zeus-library dependency to provide shared business logic and entities.
Added Flyway MySQL driver dependency to support database migrations with MySQL.
Added JSON Schema Validator library for validating request payloads against JSON schemas.
Added MariaDB JDBC driver to support MariaDB database connectivity.
Added Jackson JSR310 datatype module for proper serialization of Java 8+ date/time types.
Added Reactor Core dependency to support reactive programming constructs.
Added Hibernate Validator explicitly to ensure consistent validation behavior.
Replaced Springfox OpenAPI with SpringDoc OpenAPI Starter, which is the standard for Spring Boot 3.
Added SpringDoc Maven plugin to generate OpenAPI specification files during the build process.
Added Nexus Staging Maven plugin to automate deployment to Maven Central.
Added Maven Source and Javadoc plugins to attach source and documentation jars during release.
Added Maven GPG plugin to sign artifacts for release to Maven Central.
Updated project metadata including name, description, URL, licenses, SCM, and developer information.
Configured distribution management repositories for deploying snapshots and releases to OSSRH.
